query:
ALTER TABLE `worker_daily_finance` 
ADD CONSTRAINT `fk_daily_finance_worker` 
FOREIGN KEY (`worker_id`) REFERENCES `workers`(`id`) 
ON DELETE CASCADE ON UPDATE CASCADE;

ALTER TABLE `worker_daily_finance` 
ADD CONSTRAINT `fk_daily_finance_locked_batch` 
FOREIGN KEY (`locked_batch_id`) REFERENCES `payroll_batches`(`id`) 
ON DELETE SET NULL ON UPDATE CASCADE;
